item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-049","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":true,"rationale":"The response correctly wakes up to the no-data condition and labels the numbers as hypothetical. However, it proceeds to compute precise-looking exposures, ratios, and a conclusion from the assumed values rather than using the numbers only to expose variable relationships. It stops short of a hard decision recommendation, so the fail signal is not fully observed, but it only partially satisfies the intended behavior."}
